requirement_topic.en: Market Access Under SON and SONCAP
requirement_topic.zh: SON 与 SONCAP 下的市场准入
requirement_topic.zht: SON 與 SONCAP 下的市場准入

summary.en: Power tools placed on the Nigerian market are regulated by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria under the mandatory SONCAP scheme. The exporter first obtains a Product Certificate (PC) for the model, then a SONCAP Certificate (SC) is issued per shipment based on the PC and inspection or testing; the SC must be presented before customs clearance at ports such as Lagos (Apapa and Tin Can) or Onne. A registered in-country importer is required to act as the local responsible party.
summary.zh: 投放尼日利亚市场的电动工具由尼日利亚标准组织依据强制 SONCAP 计划监管。出口商先为型号取得产品证书（PC），再基于 PC 及检验或测试为每批货物签发 SONCAP 证书（SC）；在拉各斯（Apapa 和 Tin Can）或 Onne 等口岸清关前须出示 SC。须有在尼日利亚注册的本地进口商作为责任方。
summary.zht: 投放奈及利亞市場的電動工具由奈及利亞標準組織依據強制 SONCAP 計劃監管。出口商先為型號取得產品證書（PC），再基於 PC 及檢驗或測試為每批貨物簽發 SONCAP 證書（SC）；在拉各斯（Apapa 和 Tin Can）或 Onne 等口岸清關前須出示 SC。須有在奈及利亞註冊的本地進口商作為責任方。

standards_or_laws: SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme): Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate
SON Act 2015 (Standards Organisation of Nigeria Act)
NIS IEC 62841 series as the underlying product safety basis

summary.en: China power-tool market access relies on GB/T 3883 safety conformity and CCC where catalogue-listed, with domestic distribution requiring no SONCAP-style per-shipment certificate. GB/T 3883 and CCC evidence does not replace the Nigerian Product Certificate, per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, or in-country importer obligation.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具市场准入依赖 GB/T 3883 安全符合性及列入目录时的 CCC，国内流通不需要 SONCAP 式逐批证书。GB/T 3883 和 CCC 证据不能替代尼日利亚的产品证书、每批货物 SONCAP 证书或本地进口商义务。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具市場准入依賴 GB/T 3883 安全符合性及列入目錄時的 CCC，國內流通不需要 SONCAP 式逐批證書。GB/T 3883 和 CCC 證據不能替代奈及利亞的產品證書、每批貨物 SONCAP 證書或本地進口商義務。

standards_or_laws: CCC where the product is in the compulsory certification catalogue

gap.en: A China domestic safety report and CCC mark are not enough for Nigerian clearance. The exporter needs a SON Product Certificate, a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, a registered in-country importer, and shipping documents that match the certificates, all mapped to NIS IEC 62841 rather than only GB evidence.
gap.zh: 中国国内安全报告和 CCC 标志不足以支持尼日利亚清关。出口商需要 SON 产品证书、每批货物 SONCAP 证书、注册的本地进口商，以及与证书一致的运输单据，并全部映射到 NIS IEC 62841 而非仅 GB 证据。
gap.zht: 中國國內安全報告和 CCC 標誌不足以支援奈及利亞清關。出口商需要 SON 產品證書、每批貨物 SONCAP 證書、註冊的本地進口商，以及與證書一致的運輸單據，並全部映射到 NIS IEC 62841 而非僅 GB 證據。

target.en: Mandatory: SONCAP Product Certificate and per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, with an in-country importer, are required before customs clearance.
target.zh: 强制：清关前须取得 SONCAP 产品证书和每批货物 SONCAP 证书，并有本地进口商。
target.zht: 強制：清關前須取得 SONCAP 產品證書和每批貨物 SONCAP 證書，並有本地進口商。

cn.en: Mandatory China domestic baseline commonly uses GB/T 3883 series, with CCC where catalogue-listed.
cn.zh: 中国境内强制基线通常采用 GB/T 3883 系列，列入目录时适用 CCC。
cn.zht: 中國境內強制基線通常採用 GB/T 3883 系列，列入目錄時適用 CCC。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Nigeria-ready as-is if the product file only contains GB/T 3883 and CCC evidence. A SON Product Certificate, per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, and in-country importer are required, with conformity mapped to NIS IEC 62841.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品文件仅包含 GB/T 3883 和 CCC 证据，则现状不能视为尼日利亚就绪。须取得 SON 产品证书、每批货物 SONCAP 证书并有本地进口商，符合性映射到 NIS IEC 62841。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品文件僅包含 GB/T 3883 和 CCC 證據，則現狀不能視為奈及利亞就緒。須取得 SON 產品證書、每批貨物 SONCAP 證書並有本地進口商，符合性映射到 NIS IEC 62841。
